jdk.jfr/ValueDescriptor/getAnnotation.name: getAnnotation

element with the same name is directly present for this value descriptor,nullotherwise.

jdk.jfr/EventType/getCategoryNames.name: getCategoryNames
jdk.jfr/EventType/getCategoryNames.description:
Returns the list of human-readable names that makes up the categories for
this event type (for example,"Java Application","Statistics").

info.excerpt:
Returns the list of human-readable names that makes up the categories for
this event type (for example,"Java Application","Statistics").
Returns a predefined configuration.

jdk.jfr/Configuration/getConfigurations.name: getConfigurations
jdk.jfr/Configuration/getConfigurations.description: Returns an immutable list of predefined configurations for this Java Virtual Machine (JVM).

info.excerpt: Returns an immutable list of predefined configurations for this Java Virtual Machine (JVM).

Returns a textual identifier that specifies how a value represented by

jdk.jfr/Configuration/getContents.name: getContents

contents of a JFC file).

Returns a textual representation of the configuration (for example, the

jdk.jfr/ValueDescriptor/getDescription.name: getDescription
jdk.jfr/ValueDescriptor/getDescription.description:
Returns a sentence describing the value (for example,"Maximum
throughput in the transaction system. Value is reset after each new
batch.").

info.excerpt:
Returns a sentence describing the value (for example,"Maximum
throughput in the transaction system. Value is reset after each new
batch.").

jdk.jfr/Configuration/getDescription.name: getDescription
jdk.jfr/Configuration/getDescription.description:
Returns a short sentence that describes the configuration (for example"Low
overhead configuration safe for continuous use in production
environments")

info.excerpt:
Returns a short sentence that describes the configuration (for example"Low
overhead configuration safe for continuous use in production
environments")

jdk.jfr/EventType/getDescription.name: getDescription
jdk.jfr/EventType/getDescription.description: Returns a short sentence that describes the event class.

info.excerpt: Returns a short sentence that describes the event class.

jdk.jfr/SettingDescriptor/getDescription.name: getDescription
jdk.jfr/SettingDescriptor/getDescription.description:
Returns a sentence that describes the setting (for example"Record event with duration
above or equal to threshold").

info.excerpt:
Returns a sentence that describes the setting (for example"Record event with duration

jdk.jfr/Recording/getDestination.name: getDestination
jdk.jfr/Recording/getDestination.description:
Returns the destination file, where recording data is written when the

info.excerpt:
Returns the destination file, where recording data is written when the

jdk.jfr/Recording/getDumpOnExit.name: getDumpOnExit
jdk.jfr/Recording/getDumpOnExit.description: Returns whether this recording is dumped to disk when the JVM exits.

info.excerpt: Returns whether this recording is dumped to disk when the JVM exits.
